prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约5091名，2023年升至约4209名，2024年进一步升至约3421名，近3年累计前移约1670名；2025年回落至约3986名，较2024年后移约565名。整体呈"先升后降"波动，2025年基准约3986名；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划2022-2025年均为20人，2026年（招生计划文件）仍为20人，连续5年计划持平，对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第107名，近年排名稳定在100-110区间，学校层次稳固；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档异常记录；抖音综合热度排名第93位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现报考关注度骤升信号；第五轮学科评估中该校A-及以上学科数据未收录，但作为传统工科强校，电气工程、机械工程、化学工程与技术等学科实力突出，对工科考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业在2024-2026年专业热度分析中均被评为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，社会报考热度持续高涨；宁夏2026年高考总考生约66000人，与2025年（65897人）基本持平，考生规模无显著变化；河北工业大学位于天津市，在宁夏招生计划仅20人，占该校全国总招生比例极小（约0.3%），属于典型的跨省招生，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势（2023-2024年连续前移后2025年小幅后移）、招生计划连续5年持平、工科专业热度持续高涨以及学校软科排名微升等因素，预计2026年报考热度略有回升，最低位次较2025年小幅前移。预测最低位次约3906名，区间3406-4406名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:

- 电子信息工程（天津市）

- 新能源科学与工程（天津市）。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3406-4406名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（3406名以内）可重点冲击电子信息工程、计算机科学与技术等热门工科专业；位次在区间中段（约3906名附近）以机械、储能、测控等二档专业为主；位次接近区间上限（4406名附近）建议优先考虑三档专业确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 5091, rising to about 4209 in 2023, and further to about 3421 in 2024, with a cumulative forward shift of about 1670 positions over the past 3 years; in 2025, it fell back to about 3986, a backward shift of about 565 positions compared to 2024. Overall, it shows a "rise first, then fall" fluctuation, with a baseline of about 3986 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Ningxia was 20 students from 2022 to 2025, and remains 20 in 2026 (enrollment plan document), with a stable plan for 5 consecutive years, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 107th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 100-110 range in recent years, indicating a solid university level; reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal filing records; ranked 93rd in Douyin comprehensive popularity, rated as "average", with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no signs of a sudden surge in application attention; data on A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation is not included, but as a traditional engineering powerhouse, disciplines such as Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Chemical Engineering and Technology have outstanding strength, providing sustained appeal to engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been rated as "highly recommended" or "recommended" in the 2024-2026 major popularity analysis, with sustained high social application enthusiasm; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia college entrance examination is about 66,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (65,897), with no significant change in candidate scale; Hebei University of Technology is located in Tianjin, with only 20 enrollment spots in Ningxia, accounting for a very small proportion (about 0.3%) of the university's total national enrollment, making it a typical cross-provincial enrollment, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend (continuous forward shift from 2023 to 2024 followed by a slight backward shift in 2025), the stable enrollment plan for 5 consecutive years, the sustained high popularity of engineering majors, and the slight rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, it is expected that the application enthusiasm in 2026 will slightly rebound, with the minimum ranking moving slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3906, with a range of 3406 to 4406.

- New Energy Science and Engineering (Tianjin).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3406-4406, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, use Tier 1 majors for a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3406), you can focus on sprinting for popular engineering majors such as Electronic Information Engineering and Computer Science and Technology; if your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 3906), prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Mechanical, Energy Storage, and Measurement and Control; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 4406), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
